title: Trump trial jury begins to take shape
shortDescription: The first six jurors have been picked for Donald Trump's hush money trial. It's Tuesday's news.

title: Can the court find fair and impartial jurors for Donald Trump's trial?
shortDescription: As of Tuesday, April 16, six jurors have been selected to serve on the jury in Donald Trump's hush money trial.

title: Dismissed Trump trial juror reveals jury questions
shortDescription: Kara McGee, a dismissed Trump juror, says she was pleasantly surprised at the honesty of her fellow jurors.

title: OnPolitics: House Speaker Mike Johnson's job is in jeopardy
shortDescription: House Speaker Mike Johnson's job is in danger after another conservative hardliner publicly came out in support of forcibly removing him.

title: Marines attended charity event, not Trump fundraiser | Fact check
shortDescription: The Marines attended a nonpartisan Mar-a-Lago event hosted by a veteran suicide prevention nonprofit. Trump isn't affiliated with the organization.

title: Trump's hush money trial has begun: What to know | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Plus, Trump Media's stock price plummeted Monday. Congress is grappling with foreign aid after Iran's attack on Israel. It's all on The Excerpt.

title: Recap: 7 jurors selected to serve in Donald Trump's hush money trial
shortDescription: Jury selection continued on day 2 of former President Donald Trump's hush money criminal trial in New York, with social media posts being read aloud

title: Supreme Court considers obstruction charge in Jan. 6 cases. It could help Trump
shortDescription: A former cop asked the Supreme Court to invalidate an obstruction charge filed against one-fourth of Jan. 6 defendants including Donald Trump.

title: Biden hits Trump over taxes, 'Mar-a-Lago values' in Pennsylvania blitz
shortDescription: While Donald Trump remains in a New York courtroom, President Joe Biden is heading to Pennsylvania for a three-day campaign swing.

title: What to expect in Alejandro Mayorkas impeachment proceedings
shortDescription: The impeachment articles will be sent to the Senate on Tuesday. The chamber, controlled by Democrats, is not expected to hold a full trial.

title: Can Democrats win back blue-collar voters in 2024?
shortDescription: Trump won these congressional districts during the 2020 election. Democratic House members held them in 2022. Here’s what they tell us about 2024.

title: Voters in Northeast weigh in on upcoming presidential election
shortDescription: Shifting party preferences in Pennsylvania's 8th Congressional District could be a bellwether for how voters in swing districts might feel nationwide.

title: President Biden releases 2023 tax returns while Trump again declines
shortDescription: While President Joe Biden released his 2023 federal tax returns, presumptive Republican Donald Trump is again declining to release his.

title: Trump trial: small clashes and provocative signs outside an NYC courtroom
shortDescription: Police barricades tried to separate small crowds of pro- and anti-Trump demonstrators who occasionally tousled but largely remained in their own camps
